name: translate_batch
description: Translate multiple text strings in a single API request. All texts are translated to the same target language(s). This is more efficient and cost-effective than making individual translate_text calls for each string. Ideal for translating lists of UI strings, product descriptions, or content batches.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: Array of multiple text strings to translate in batch. Each string is translated independently.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Array of target language codes. All texts will be translated to each specified language.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Source language code. If omitted, each text's language is auto-detected independently.

translated: Por favor confirme su direccion de correo electronico
